evidence.scope: The determinant-one counterexample over algebraically closed fields of characteristic 3.

scope: The determinant-one counterexample over algebraically closed fields of characteristic 3.
statement: Over an algebraically closed field of characteristic 3, the map is surjective while remaining étale and noninjective.
title: Surjectivity in algebraically closed characteristic three
